sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69022" key="muqi/amboi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡθ-ίαμβοι</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen></foreign>, the name given to a collection of Fables, such as those of <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author></bibl>, ib.</entryFree>
